sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Hydro reduces ownership in Vianode - Norsk Hydro  ( OTC:NHYDY )
feed.summary: On September 6, the private equity fund Altor exercised a put option requiring Hydro to acquire an additional 20 percent of Vianode. This transaction has not been executed. Hydro has agreed with Altor to cancel the put option and has further sold 10.1 percent of Vianode to Altor.
